title: indigofera occidentalis
intro: Indigofera occidentalis, also known as Wild Indigo, is a perennial plant native to North America, characterized by its small white or purple flowers and heart-shaped leaves. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion and alleviate symptoms of colds and fever. The health benefits of Indigofera occidentalis include its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. Indigofera occidentalis is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and can also be used in herbal supplements and topical creams.
